prose: The Fukui reactivity indices for pyridine were computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory. **Fukui Reactivity Indices** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`; this was a single-point calculation, geometry was not optimized. SCF converged. **Warnings:** * `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)` * `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)` | Atom (1-based index) | Symbol | f⁺ (Electrophilic) | f⁻ (Nucleophilic) | f⁰ (Radical) | Dual Descriptor (Δf) | |---|---|---|---|---|---| | 1 | N | 0.4842257 | 0.0641227 | 0.2741742 | 0.4201031 | | 2 | C | 0.3244723 | 0.0061877 | 0.1653300 | 0.3182846 | | 3 | C | 0.1403209 | 0.1182314 | 0.1292762 | 0.0220895 | | 4 | C | 0.1403959 | 0.1182626 | 0.1293292 | 0.0221333 | | 5 | C | 0.2996263 | 0.1120660 | 0.2058461 | 0.1875603 | | 6 | C | 0.2994771 | 0.1120098 | 0.2057435 | 0.1874672 | | 7 | H | -0.1415132 | 0.0828485 | -0.0293323 | -0.2243617 | | 8 | H | -0.1336841 | 0.0981795 | -0.0177523 | -0.2318636 | | 9 | H | -0.1336591 | 0.0981823 | -0.0177384 | -0.2318413 | | 10 | H | -0.1398163 | 0.0949601 | -0.0224281 | -0.2347764 | | 11 | H | -0.1398454 | 0.0949495 | -0.0224480 | -0.2347949 | The most electrophilic atom is N (atom 1) with an f⁺ value of 0.4842257. The most nucleophilic atom is C (atom 4) with an f⁻ value of 0.1182626.
